titleStmt.title: SII 15.221: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 221. (B.K. No. 22 of 1926-27.) NĀGĀVI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar in the Kōḍi Basavaṇṇa temple.

This is dated the 21st regnal year of the king, Prajāpati, Kārttika-puṇṇami, Monday, corresponding to 1211 A.D., October 23. The weekday, however, was Sunday. The reference to Saṅkramaṇa in the date appears to be conventional.

It records a gift of land to the God Mahābalēśvara of Nāgāvi for worship and offerings by Dharmarāśi-paṇḍita, after washing the feet of Sōmēśvaradēva the Āchārya of the temple. The land was purchased by the donor for this purpose.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇaṁ pratā
pa cakravartti vīraballāḷadēvavarṣada 21 neya prajāpatiThe letter pa is written upside down.
saṁvatsarada kārttikada puṁṇnami sōmavāra bya
tīpāta saṁkramaṇadaṁdu nāgāviya śrī mahā
baḷēśvaradēvara Aṁgabhōga raṁgabhōgakke� dharṁmmaThe letter va is written above the line.
rāsi paṁḍitanu kālaḍiya bōdarasana �yya
maṁnneya volada muṁnina keyyaṁ baḍagaṇa bhāgadalli mā
ṟukoṁḍa keyyi mattaroṁdumaṁ śrīmahābaḷēsvaradēvara
Ācārya śrī sōmēśvara dēvara kālaṁ toḷedu dhārā
pūrvvakavāgi koṭṭa keyi mattaroṁdu yī dharmava
nā [Eṁṭu] hiṭṭu Aṟuvattūkkaluṁ caṁdrārkka
tārāṁbaraṁ pratipāḷisuvaru ©
Digital edition of SII 15.221 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
